title: DocMed Landing Page (`app/page.tsx`)
content:
This file defines the main landing page for the DocMed application. ## Purpose The primary purpose of this file is to serve as the entry point for the DocMed website, showcasing the product's features, benefits, and encouraging user sign-ups. ## Key Components & Exports - **`Navbar`**: A fixed header component with a logo, navigation links, and a mobile menu toggle. - **`Hero`**: The main hero section featuring a `DotGlobeHero` component, a headline, subtext, and call-to-action buttons. - **`TrustBar`**: A section displaying key attributes or technologies used by DocMed. - **`Features`**: A section detailing the core features of DocMed, each with an icon, title, description, and a highlight. - **`HowItWorks`**: A multi-step section explaining the process of using DocMed. - **`Stats`**: A section presenting key statistics or metrics related to DocMed's effectiveness. - **`CTA`**: A prominent Call to Action section encouraging users to sign up, featuring an email input and a submit button. - **`Footer`**: A standard footer with a logo and copyright information. - **`Home` (default export)**: The main React component that orchestrates and renders all the above sections. ## Usage Example This file is the root page of the Next.js application and is automatically rendered when a user visits the base URL of the deployed application. ```jsx // app/page.tsx import Home from './page'; // Assuming this file is imported elsewhere // ... other components export default function App() { return (
{/* Other layout components if any */}
); } ```
